channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Bringing zero downtime to anywhere work
item.description: In a work-from-anywhere world, how can a team of so few be expected to keep doing so much for so many? The pace is unsustainable. It’s time for IT to enlist some support of its own and delegate—handing off time-consuming tasks to people and to intelligent, automated tools.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Social Video's Push for Speed: YouTube and TikTok Experiment with Playback Speeds
item.description: YouTube's new experiment allows Premium users to quadruple the speed of its videos, while TikTok users can up the tempo with a simple push-and-hold. The social media companies are pushing to shorten their video offerings.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Tesla’s Q4 results fell short of Wall Street’s forecasts. Here’s why
item.description: Tesla’s fourth-quarter adjusted profits rose slightly amid a big push to sell its electric vehicles with offers of zero financing and other incentives, but the results still fell short of Wall Street forecasts.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Apple's iPhone sales during the holiday season slipped despite a highly anticipated AI rollout
item.description: Apple on Thursday disclosed its iPhone sales dipped slightly during the holiday-season quarter, signaling a sluggish start to the trendsetting company’s effort to catch up to the rest of Big Tech in the race to bring artificial intelligence to the masses.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: US cybersecurity agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Amazon sues state agency to block release of company records to Bezos-owned Washington Post
item.description: Amazon is suing a Washington state agency to prevent the release of some company materials to The Washington Post, the newspaper which is owned by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Civ 7 requirements for PC, Steam Deck, Linux, and Mac
item.description: Here are the Civ 7 requirements for PC, Mac, and Steam Deck. This includes minimum and recommended PC specs for the game so that you can see whether you can run it.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft’s new DocumentDB rethinks NoSQL on PostgreSQL
item.description: Microsoft’s recent launch of a standalone version of the MongoDB compatibility layer for its global-scale Azure Cosmos DB brought back an old name. Back in 2018, when the company unveiled a public version of the Project Florence database engine that powers much of Azure, they called it DocumentDB.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Sourcegraph unveils AI coding agents
item.description: Looking to challenge well-established GitHub Copilot in AI-powered coding assistance, Sourcegraph has announced coding agents for code review, code migration, testing, documentation, and notification, along with an API for building custom agents. Sourcegraph made the announcement on January 29.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft reports 10% quarterly profit growth as it works to show AI investments paying off
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AI-powered automation set for gains in 2025
item.description: Automation technology has long been a part of IT’s arsenal, as enterprises work to simplify increasingly complex networking and operational environments. Looking ahead, the more AI is added to the automation mix, the more enterprise operations teams stand to gain.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Async closure support is stable for Rust 1.85
item.description: Rust’s leadership team announced progress on the 26 Rust project goals for 2024. Leadership representatives said the project emphasized work on asynchronous closures and finalizing its Rust development goals for early 2025.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 4 tiny Docker images for lightweight containers
item.description: Docker images can get pretty bulky if you’re not careful. Your typical Docker image includes everything you need to run a particular piece of software (such as the application language’s runtime) and everything those things depend on.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fake toll road texts sweep America as Chinese scammers target US drivers
item.description: Toll road text scam: Fake messages claim unpaid fees, seek payment via fraudulent links. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says this scam is becoming increasingly sophisticated and widespread.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Endor Labs’ new tool helps enterprises track the AI models they use
item.description: Software supply chain security vendor Endor Labs has added another dimension to its products with Tuesday’s launch of AI Model Discovery, which will be part of its core open-source evaluation offering.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Its most recent mega-acquisition is its $28 billion purchase of Splunk, a bold move that adds revenue opportunities in observability, data analytics, AIOps, and genAI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, KRON4
